author: Adya
content: A powerful step forward for the AI builder ecosystem in India. We’re proud to see the Adya Launch Lab inaugurated at KIT-Kalaignarkarunanidhi Institute of Technology Institute of Technology, Coimbatore, marking the beginning of a deeper collaboration between academia and industry to shape the next generation of AI innovators. The inauguration, led by Adya Founder & CEO Shayak Mazumder , represents more than just a lab launch, it represents a shared commitment to giving students access to the tools, platforms, and mentorship needed to build real-world AI systems. The Adya Launch Lab at KIT will serve as a hub where students can: • Explore Agentic AI and Generative AI technologies • Build real-world AI products and intelligent systems • Work with modern AI platforms and development tools • Engage with industry-driven research and startup innovation Our goal with Launch Lab is simple: Enable students to move from learning AI to building AI. We are grateful to the leadership and faculty at KIT-Kalaignarkarunanidhi Institute of Technology Institute of Technology for their vision in fostering an ecosystem where technology, research, and entrepreneurship come together. A special thank you to the entire KIT community for the incredible enthusiasm and support in making this initiative possible. This is just the beginning. The future of AI will be built not only in labs and companies, but also in campuses where the next generation of builders are learning, experimenting, and creating. #AdyaAI #AdyaLaunchLab #AgenticAI #ArtificialIntelligence #AIInnovation #IndustryAcademia #FutureOfAI #TechEducation #BuildInPublic #InnovationIndia

author: View Shayak Mazumder’s profile
content: 🚀 Adya is Hiring — Founders’ Office Intern We’re looking for a sharp, highly reliable intern to work directly with the founders at Adya . You’ll help run AI-driven projects, research initiatives, reports, and internal coordination using modern AI and agentic tools. This role involves: * Working with business leaders and internal teams * Gathering information and creating structured reports * Using AI tools to automate and execute tasks * Doing independent research and solving problems We’re looking for someone who is: * Extremely diligent and dependable * Very comfortable using AI tools * Able to work independently with minimal handholding * Curious and proactive This is a rare opportunity to see how AI systems and companies are built from the inside. If interested, DM your CV or share this with someone who should apply. Please include a cover letter mentioning any relevant experience such as placement committee member using AI to optimise tasks, previous founders' office experience, organising clubs and events using AI to optimise your work. Include the projects you have executed to prove your previous experience. Only candidates who can prove similar work experience will be considered.

author: Adya
content: 500+ builders. One campus. One mission, build the future of AI. Today, the Adya Launch Lab Roadshow arrived at KIT-Kalaignarkarunanidhi Institute of Technology , and the response from the builder community in Tamil Nadu was incredible. Packed auditoriums. Hands-on hacking sessions. Hundreds of students exploring what it means to build with AI. Throughout the day, participants dove into: • AI hackathons • Agentic AI workflows • Startup building & product thinking • Founder conversations and ecosystem networking With Shayak Mazumder , CEO of Adya , interacting with students during the sessions, the discussion moved beyond theory, focusing on how builders today can create real AI-powered systems and startups. A special thanks to Vimal Shanmuganathan , Dean (SoC & ET), for his strong support in enabling this initiative and bringing together such an enthusiastic community of builders at KIT. And to the ecosystem partners helping power the Adya Launch Lab movement across India: IDFC FIRST Bank Startup India Headstart Network Foundation IBM Ventures This is what Adya Launch Lab is about. Not just learning about AI. Building with it. If you were there today, it was great meeting you. And if you missed this one… the builder movement is just getting started. #AdyaLaunchLab #AgenticAI #AIHackathon #StartupIndia #AIBuilderProgram #BuildInPublic #InnovationIndia

author: View Veera Venkata Satish Nukella’s profile
content: A startup just raised over $1 billion to build AI that can 𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑠𝑜𝑛. Not just predict the next word. This is a major bet on a different path to intelligence. Advanced Machine Intelligence (AMI), founded by AI pioneer Yann LeCun, announced a $1.03B funding round. Their goal? Move beyond today's language models. They're building "world models"—AI that learns from visuals to understand the physical world. Think of it like common sense for machines. This is crucial for applications where prediction isn't enough. 👉 Manufacturing plants needing real-time decision support. 👉 Domestic robots that navigate a messy kitchen. 👉 Autonomous systems that plan and adapt. The funding signals a significant shift. Investors are placing big bets on architectures that prioritize reasoning and safety over sheer scale in text generation. It’s a reminder that intelligence is multifaceted. True autonomy requires more than linguistic fluency. What's the most exciting non-LLM application of AI you see emerging? #ArtificialIntelligence #MachineLearning #DeepTech #Innovation 𝐒𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐜𝐞: https://lnkd.in/g9_a95jJ Ponnada Nagendra Veera Manikanta Dammala

author: MorphusAI
content: "AI democratizes creation" — everyone says this. But nobody talks about the second half. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Without expertise, AI doesn't make you a creator. It just helps you fail faster... with more confidence. 💀 A founder asks an LLM for a marketing strategy. Five bullet points come back. Grammatically perfect. Strategically hollow. 💀 A non-designer asks for a café floor plan. It looks stunning — until you realize the restroom is next to the kitchen. The output looks right. Feels right. But it isn't. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ And the most dangerous part? The person who asked... can't tell the difference. Intelligence is cheap. Expertise is not. ...right? #AI #GenerativeAI #Startup #Leadership #MorphusAI

author: View Prateek Jain’s profile
content: 🍔 AI Practice Project — McDonald’s As part of my daily brand practice series, today I explored how AI video can capture the fun, fast, and instantly recognizable vibe of McDonald’s. For this concept, I focused on translating the brand’s playful energy and quick-service experience into short-form AI storytelling. Key focus areas: ✨ Appetizing food visuals & close-up textures 🎬 Fast, engaging cuts inspired by social media ads 🍟 Bright, cheerful color palette and lighting The goal is to understand how AI tools can help recreate the excitement and familiarity that global food brands like McDonald’s deliver through their marketing. Practicing every day to sharpen: • AI Video Creation • Brand Storytelling • Performance-driven creative thinking Open to feedback 🤝 #AIVideo #GenerativeAI #AIinMarketing #BrandStorytelling #FoodMarketing #CreativeAI #VideoMarketing #DigitalCreativity #ContentMarketing #MarketingInnovation #FutureOfContent #VisualStorytelling
